Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x189F "WILDWESTSEYMOUR-C000-189F" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Wild West Seymour.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $C000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$0960 - $0AFF $5660 - $5BFF $BD90 - $C7FF $CD00 - $CFFF
